summary: Bug fix verified: Gallery images now display correctly on frontend. Image count badges show on PremiumCarCard (e.g., '5' for Mercedes-Benz E-Class). Gallery thumbnails on CarDetailPage work with click-to-select functionality and orange border for active state. Main image changes when clicking thumbnails.

issues: Some gallery images return 404 (e.g., Unsplash photo-1617531653520) - this is a DATA issue with broken image URLs in the database, NOT a code issue. The gallery code handles this gracefully by showing alt text.

passed_tests: Frontend: Inventory page shows image count badges on all car cards with gallery images
Frontend: Mercedes-Benz E-Class shows '5' badge (1 main + 4 gallery images)
Frontend: Image count badge displays Images icon (lucide-react) with count
Frontend: CarDetailPage shows main image + gallery thumbnails
Frontend: Clicking gallery thumbnails changes the main displayed image
Frontend: Active thumbnail has orange border (border-orange-500)
Frontend: Gallery properly combines main image with gallery array (galleryImages useMemo)
Frontend: Clicking back to first thumbnail returns to original image
Frontend: totalImages calculation in PremiumCarCard works correctly (1 + gallery.length)
critical_code_review_comments: CarDetailPage.js: galleryImages useMemo (lines 91-115) correctly combines car.image with car.gallery array, avoiding duplicates
CarDetailPage.js: activeImage state (line 18) tracks selected thumbnail index
CarDetailPage.js: Thumbnail gallery (lines 185-199) renders clickable buttons with orange border for active state
PremiumCarCard.js: totalImages calculation (line 10) correctly computes 1 + gallery.length
PremiumCarCard.js: Image count badge (lines 86-94) displays only when totalImages > 1 with Images icon
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing cars: Mercedes-Benz E-Class (ID: 0e7e6b4a-4369-447b-8a55-9ebb633f26d9), BMW 3 Series (ID: bc3455ab-889f-4c51-b799-43b71a0ded7d)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gallery bug fix verified. Key changes: 1) CarDetailPage.js uses galleryImages useMemo to combine car.image with car.gallery array. 2) PremiumCarCard.js shows image count badge with Images icon when totalImages > 1. Note: Some Unsplash gallery URLs return 404 (data issue, not code issue). Test cars: Mercedes-Benz E-Class has 5 images, BMW 3 Series has 4 images.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Frontend was reading car.gallery_urls instead of car.gallery. The backend stores gallery as an array in car.gallery field.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: 1) Updated CarDetailPage.js to read car.gallery instead of car.gallery_urls. 2) Added galleryImages useMemo to combine main image with gallery array without duplicates. 3) Added image count badge to PremiumCarCard showing total images (1 + gallery.length). 4) Added thumbnail gallery with click-to-select functionality and orange border for active state.
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Tested on inventory page - all cars with gallery images show correct count badges. Tested on car detail page - thumbnails are clickable, main image changes, active thumbnail has orange border.
